text.title: Agency P&L Tracker Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree mapping artefact state to a rule.

conclusion.verdict: close every month; backfill last quarter if needed

branch.when: cadence_off == false AND aggregate_only == false AND contractor_misclassed == true
cadence_off == false AND aggregate_only == false AND contractor_misclassed == false AND util_missing == true
cadence_off == false AND aggregate_only == false AND contractor_misclassed == false AND util_missing == false AND variance_missing == true
cadence_off == false AND aggregate_only == false AND contractor_misclassed == false AND util_missing == false AND variance_missing == false

conclusion.verdict: preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: cadence_off=false, aggregate_only=false, contractor_misclassed=false, util_missing=false, variance_missing=false → accept P&L.
